title: 100Pcs Link Balloons Black, Black Quick Link Balloons, Balloon Arch Strip for Wedding Birthday Baby Shower Engagement Graduation Party Decorations(black)
features: 【Complete Arch Building Set】：This package includes 100 premium black quick link balloons designed specifically for creating decorative displays. These black linking balloons connect easily to form continuous chains perfect for constructing full balloon arch arrangements

【Complete Arch Building Set】：This package includes 100 premium link balloons black designed specifically for creating decorative displays. These black link balloons connect easily to form continuous chains perfect for constructing full balloon arch arrangements

【Premium Metallic Finish】：These linkable balloons feature a chrome coating that reflects light beautifully. The high-quality latex construction ensures these black quick link balloons maintain their glossy appearance throughout your event

【Versatile Arch Construction】：Use these linking balloons to create various arch shapes and decorative installations. The uniform size of these black linking balloons ensures consistent appearance when building professional-looking party decorations

【Multi-Event Application】：Suitable for weddings, birthdays, and celebrations, these black balloons enhance any occasion. The connecting feature makes these balloon arch strip components ideal for creating customized decorative elements that transform event spaces
description: Product description These black quick link balloons easily to form beautiful balloon arch displays and decorative strips. The premium latex material features a reflective chrome finish, making these link balloons black arrangements ideal for weddings, birthdays, and special events. Easy to inflate and connect, these versatile black link balloons help you build professional-looking decorations that elevate any celebration space with shimmering elegance Specifications Product Name: 100Pcs Gold Metallic Chrome Balloons (Connecting Balloons) Color: Gold Material: Latex Weight: 140g Product Size: 13cm /5.1in Packaging Size: 33×23×1.9cm / 12.1×9×0.75in Safety Warning No
